title: Text-First Audio Workflow in Timeline Character Lanes

issues.title: T25 — Text-Block Data Model + Lane Link Persistence
issues.body:
Intent: SQLite schema and repository changes so character dialog lanes can store a linked scene/shot and MVE Lines can exist without an audio clip.

Acceptance:
- [x] Migration adds mve_lane_links table
- [x] Unit test: lane link CRUD
- [x] Unit test: create MVE line without audioClipId

Runtime: local-desktop only.

Design: .qa/design/text-first-audio-workflow.md

issues.title: T26 — Lane Header: Plus Button → Text hinzufügen
issues.body:
Intent: The plus button in character dialog lanes creates a new text block instead of audio. SFX/Music/Atmo lanes keep existing Add Audio flow.

Acceptance:
- [x] Plus button on dialog lanes shows "Text hinzufügen"
- [x] Inline text block appears in the lane
- [x] SFX/Music/Atmo unchanged
- [x] E2E screenshot in QA harness

Depends on: #ISSUE_T25
Runtime: local-desktop only.

issues.title: T27 — Inline Text Editor with Enhance + Tags
issues.body:
Intent: Text block editor supports `--tag` highlighting, a tag helper toolbar, and inline enhance suggestions that can be confirmed or rejected.

Acceptance:
- [ ] `--*` tags highlighted in purple
- [ ] Tag helper toolbar available
- [ ] Enhance suggestions confirmable/rejectable
- [ ] Text changes persisted
- [ ] E2E screenshot

Depends on: #ISSUE_T26
Runtime: local-desktop only.

issues.title: T28 — Audio Derivation in Text Block (Generate/Upload/Record)
issues.body:
Intent: Text block has a permanent menu with Generate Audio, Upload Audio, Record Audio. Audio becomes a child of the linked scene; Generate auto-selects the first successful take via the existing MVE render flow.

Acceptance:
- [ ] Generate starts MVE render for the text block
- [ ] After generate, block appears as audio clip
- [ ] Upload creates audio clip bound to the text block
- [ ] Record creates audio clip bound to the text block
- [ ] Scene selection modal shown when no lane link or user overrides
- [ ] E2E screenshot + smoke test

Depends on: #ISSUE_T27
Runtime: local-desktop only.

issues.title: T29 — Ripple: Extend Scene + Parents for Longer Audio
issues.body:
Intent: When an audio clip is longer than its scene, extend the scene and ripple-shift sequences, acts, and following scenes.

Acceptance:
- [ ] Unit test: delta calculation
- [ ] Unit test: ripple preview correct
- [ ] E2E screenshot

Depends on: #ISSUE_T28
Runtime: local-desktop only.

issues.title: T30 — Lane Link Icon + Scene Selection Modal
issues.body:
Intent: Lane settings header gets a link icon next to delete. Clicking opens a modal to pick Act/Sequence/Scene (and Shot for film projects) as the default target for new text blocks.

Acceptance:
- [ ] Link icon in header
- [ ] Modal with Act/Sequence/Scene
- [ ] Save + display link status in header
- [ ] E2E screenshot

Depends on: #ISSUE_T25
Runtime: local-desktop only.

issues.title: T31 — Recording Metronome + Settings Modal
issues.body:
Intent: A configurable metronome count-in (3 clicks) plays before every recording. Settings (BPM, time signature) via a button in the timeline view.

Acceptance:
- [ ] 3-click count-in before recording
- [ ] Settings modal for BPM/time signature
- [ ] Unit test for scheduling logic
- [ ] E2E screenshot

Depends on: #ISSUE_T28
Runtime: local-desktop only.

issues.title: T32 — Drag & Drop Text Block Between Scenes
issues.body:
Intent: Users can drag a text block to another scene. If audio exists, it follows.

Acceptance:
- [ ] Text block drag & drop between scenes
- [ ] Audio clip follows
- [ ] E2E screenshot

Depends on: #ISSUE_T26
Runtime: local-desktop only.
